mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.email_verified_at, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, COUNT(t.id) AS transaction_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.user_id = u.id AND t.deleted = 0
GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.email_verified_at, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.email_verified_at, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, COUNT(t.id) AS transaction_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.user_id = u.id AND t.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.email, u.email_verified_at, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at

SELECT COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, MAX(occurred_at) AS last_transaction_at FROM transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = t.payment_method_id AND pm.user_id = t.user_id AND pm.deleted = 0

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, t.type, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.item_name, ''), c.name, '') AS item_name, t.amount, t.occurred_at, t.channel, t.online_app, t.online_platform_id, t.offline_place, t.payment_method_id, COALESCE(pm.name, t.payment_method_name, '') AS payment_method_name, t.category_id, COALESCE(c.name, '已删除分类') AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, t.note FROM transactions t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = t.payment_method_id AND pm.user_id = t.user_id AND pm.deleted = 0
ORDER BY t.occurred_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'DISABLED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email_verified_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM import_jobs WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND created_at >= #{since}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM transactions WHERE deleted = 0 AND type = #{type}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM transactions WHERE deleted = 0 AND occurred_at >= #{since}

SELECT DATE(occurred_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'EXPENSE' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'INCOME' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users FROM transactions WHERE deleted = 0 AND occurred_at >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(occurred_at) ORDER BY DATE(occurred_at)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_audit_logs

SELECT l.id, l.admin_user_id, u.username AS admin_username, l.action, l.target_type, l.target_id, l.reason, l.created_at FROM admin_audit_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.admin_user_id ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_audit_logs l

SELECT l.id, l.admin_user_id, u.username AS admin_username, l.action, l.target_type, l.target_id, l.reason, l.created_at FROM admin_audit_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.admin_user_id
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id, t.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, t.type, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.item_name, ''), c.name, '') AS item_name, t.amount, t.occurred_at, t.channel, t.online_app, t.online_platform_id, t.offline_place, t.payment_method_id, COALESCE(pm.name, t.payment_method_name, '') AS payment_method_name, t.category_id, COALESCE(c.name, '已删除分类') AS category_name, c.icon AS category_icon, t.note FROM transactions t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = t.payment_method_id AND pm.user_id = t.user_id AND pm.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.occurred_at >= #{since} AND t.amount >= #{amountThreshold} ORDER BY t.amount DESC, t.occurred_at DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT l.id, l.admin_user_id, u.username AS admin_username, l.action, l.target_type, l.target_id, l.reason, l.created_at FROM admin_audit_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.admin_user_id ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.id AS tx_id, t.user_id AS tx_user_id, u.username AS tx_username, u.nickname AS tx_nickname, t.type AS tx_type, COALESCE(NULLIF(t.item_name, ''), c.name, '') AS tx_item_name, t.amount AS tx_amount, t.occurred_at AS tx_occurred_at, t.channel AS tx_channel, t.online_app AS tx_online_app, t.online_platform_id AS tx_online_platform_id, t.offline_place AS tx_offline_place, t.payment_method_id AS tx_payment_method_id, COALESCE(pm.name, t.payment_method_name, '') AS tx_payment_method_name, t.category_id AS tx_category_id, COALESCE(c.name, '已删除分类') AS tx_category_name, c.icon AS tx_category_icon, t.note AS tx_note, u.id AS user_id, u.username AS user_username, u.nickname AS user_nickname, u.email AS user_email, u.email_verified_at AS user_email_verified_at, u.status AS user_status, u.created_at AS user_created_at, u.updated_at AS user_updated_at, COUNT(all_t.id) AS user_transaction_count, COUNT(all_t.id) AS stat_transaction_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN all_t.type = 'EXPENSE' THEN all_t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS stat_total_expense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN all_t.type = 'INCOME' THEN all_t.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS stat_total_income, MAX(all_t.occurred_at) AS stat_last_transaction_at FROM transactions t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = t.category_id AND c.user_id = t.user_id LEFT JOIN payment_methods pm ON pm.id = t.payment_method_id AND pm.user_id = t.user_id AND pm.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN transactions all_t ON all_t.user_id = u.id AND all_t.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.id, t.user_id, u.username, u.nickname, t.type, t.item_name, c.name, t.amount, t.occurred_at, t.channel, t.online_app, t.online_platform_id, t.offline_place, t.payment_method_id, pm.name, t.payment_method_name, t.category_id, c.icon, t.note, u.id, u.email, u.email_verified_at, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at

SELECT id, original_filename AS original_filename, content_type AS content_type, size_bytes AS size_bytes, NULL AS url, sort_order AS sort_order FROM transaction_images WHERE transaction_id = #{transactionId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT l.id, l.admin_user_id, u.username AS admin_username, l.action, l.target_type, l.target_id, l.reason, l.created_at FROM admin_audit_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = l.admin_user_id WHERE l.target_type = #{targetType} AND l.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
